title: Architect WorldCup Prediction A, the math model knockout call
description: Per-tie 90-minute three-way and advance probability read from the existing math model: the Dixon-Coles analytic three-way at a neutral venue plus the Elo shootout lean. Bit-reproducible from a fixed seed and dated data. A is frozen and never edited by B or C.

prediction.description: Identifies this as the math model call.

as_of_date.description: Model fit cutoff, the day before the round kicks off.

committed_at.description: Git commit time, before-kickoff leakage proof. Null until committed.

seed.description: Seed of the underlying simulation context, recorded for reproducibility.

ties.description: One record per real fixture in the round.

match.description: Official fixture number from the published schedule.

home_team.description: Nominal home: the first-listed team in the official fixture. A labelling convention only, since the venue is neutral.

p_home_win_90.description: Probability the nominal home side wins in 90 minutes.

p_draw_90.description: Probability of a 90-minute draw, a valid knockout outcome.

shootout_lean.description: Probability the nominal home side advances given a 90-minute draw, from the Elo shootout lean.
